chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1343 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 01-09-2022 Mr. Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for respondents / SEPCO. Mr. Kareem Bux Janwari, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant petition, the petitioner, who is widow of late Fayaz Ahmed son of Muhammad Aslam, who was employee of SEPCO, Sukkur and served as ALM Operation, Sub-Division SITE, SEPCO, Sukkur, under the supervision of Executive Engineer, Operation Division, SEPCO, Sukkur, and died on 23-11-2020, seeks directions to the respondents to release the pension / gratuity in line with the Assistance Package for the families of the deceased for the services of her husband. Today, Imdad Ali Mirani, Finance Director, SEPCO, Sukkur and Deepak Kumar, Manager (HR), SEPCO, Sukkur, are present and their Counsel Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh files a statement, which is taken on record. The learned Counsel, appearing for SEPCO, states that as per rules, the petitioner is entitled for Group Life Insurance Claim, Prime Minister’s Assistance Package and WAPDA Welfare Fund Grant (Widow Grant), and the case of the petitioner for aforesaid grants is under process and likely to be completed within two months hereof. We, therefore, dispose of this petition by directing respondent No.7 / Finance Director, SEPCO, Sukkur, to ensure issuance of aforementioned grants to the petitioner within two months hereof. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms.

We, therefore, dispose of this petition by directing respondent No.7 / Finance Director, SEPCO, Sukkur, to ensure issuance of aforementioned grants to the petitioner within two months hereof. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
